# format: html5-dom-v2
# status: active

#dom-snapshot-v2
#document
  <!doctype html>
  element ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
    element ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
      element ns=html local="template" attrs=[]
        #template-contents
          "outer"
          element ns=html local="template" attrs=[]
            #template-contents
              element ns=html local="b" attrs=[]
                "inner"
